# apiModule

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for ApiModule records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app api-module list
app api-module get --id <value>
app api-module create --databaseId <value> --apiId <value> --name <value> --data <value>
app api-module update --id <value> [--databaseId <value>] [--apiId <value>] [--name <value>] [--data <value>]
app api-module delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all apiModule records

```bash
app api-module list
```

### Create a apiModule

```bash
app api-module create --databaseId "value" --apiId "value" --name "value" --data "value"
```

### Get a apiModule by id

```bash
app api-module get --id <value>
```
